subgoal: Tap the email body compose area to focus it and type a short message notifying about the meeting at 2026-03-18 14:00
acceptance_criteria: Success means the email compose screen stays in the same app and the message body area is focused/active (cursor shown or keyboard opened) and the body content is updated to include the provided multi-line reminder message mentioning the meeting time (2026-03-18 14:00). Exact formatting is not required as long as the body contains the key parts of the inserted text.

llm_result.reason: The UI remains on the email compose screen (Send/Attach still present). The body placeholder text "Compose email" is replaced with actual body content starting with "Hello," and the body area is an EditText/compose area, indicating it was focused and text was entered. The inserted content includes the meeting date/time (2026-03-18 14:00) per evidence.

notable_changes: Email body changed from placeholder "Compose email" to entered text starting with "Hello," (indicating body was tapped/focused and typed into)

suspicious_signals: Keyboard/cursor not explicitly shown in UI summary, but body content update strongly implies successful focus and typing

final.reason: The UI remains on the email compose screen (Send/Attach still present). The body placeholder text "Compose email" is replaced with actual body content starting with "Hello," and the body area is an EditText/compose area, indicating it was focused and text was entered. The inserted content includes the meeting date/time (2026-03-18 14:00) per evidence.
